mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, profile_key, profile_value, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{profileKey}, #{profileValue}, FALSE) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE profile_value = VALUES(profile_value), is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, profile_key, profile_value, is_deleted FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
